About Us

Engineers and tradesmen
under one roof.

KERM General Engineering Services Limited is a Uganda-based engineering outfit built around a simple idea: a property owner shouldn't need five different contractors for wiring, plumbing, cooling, security, and finishing. One crew, carrying the KERM name, handles it end to end.

That range shows up on our sites — the same team that pulls cable through a wall and mounts a security camera is the one hanging a crystal chandelier in the sitting room once the ceiling is ready.

“Quality at all costs” isn’t a slogan we chose for the logo. It's the standard every job gets held to, whether it's a single socket or a full house build.
ELECTRICAL & SOLAR AC & REFRIGERATION PLUMBING CIVIL CONSTRUCTION CCTV & CAMERAS LIGHTING & CHANDELIERS ELECTRONICS & ACCESSORIES
TEAM ON SITE
Services

Everything between
the wall and the finish.

Eight trades, one work order. Below is what we cover, followed by the sites we've covered it on.

WO / ELEC‑01

Electrical & Solar Installation

Full house and commercial wiring, distribution boards, and solar power systems installed from scratch.

NEW INSTALL
WO / HVAC‑02

Air Conditioning & Refrigeration

Supply, installation, and servicing of AC units and refrigeration equipment for homes and businesses.

SUPPLY & FIT
WO / ELEC‑03

Electrical & Solar Maintenance

Fault-finding, repairs, and scheduled upkeep for existing wiring and solar installations.

CALL-OUT
WO / RTL‑04

Electronics & Accessories

A stocked showroom of electrical fittings, appliances, and accessories — walk in or order ahead.

IN STOCK
WO / SEC‑05

Camera Installation

CCTV supply and installation for homes, shops, and compounds, wired into a system you can monitor.

CCTV SETUP
WO / PLM‑06

Plumbing

Water supply lines, drainage, and fittings — from first-fix pipework to finished bathrooms.

FIRST & SECOND FIX
WO / LGT‑07

Lighting & Chandeliers

A showroom of decorative chandeliers and LED fittings, supplied and installed to match the room.

SUPPLY & INSTALL
WO / CIV‑08

Civil Construction

Full house builds and site works, from foundation and structure through to roofing and finishing.

Our Work

Proof from the field,
not a stock photo.

A look through recent sites and installations. Filter by trade to see specific work.

From Ground to Finish

How a KERM site moves.

General stages of progress across our civil construction sites — from foundation slab to a finished, lit interior.

STAGE 01

Foundation & Slab

Slab cast and set before walls go up.

STAGE 02

Walls & Structure

Brickwork and reinforced columns rise.

STAGE 03

Roofing

Timber framing goes on ahead of covering.

STAGE 04

Structure Complete

Shell finished, ready for services and finishing.

STAGE 05

Interior & Lighting

Wiring, ceiling work, and fittings complete the room.
